allow: PowerShell(az webapp show -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg --query "{state:state, linuxFxVersion:siteConfig.linuxFxVersion, defaultHostName:defaultHostName, kind:kind}" -o json 2>&1)
PowerShell(az webapp config show -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg --query "{appCommandLine:appCommandLine, linuxFxVersion:linuxFxVersion, netFrameworkVersion:netFrameworkVersion}" -o json 2>&1)
PowerShell(az webapp deployment list-publishing-profiles -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg --query "[?publishMethod=='ZipDeploy'].{method:publishMethod, url:publishUrl}" -o json 2>&1)
PowerShell(az webapp log deployment show -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg 2>&1)
PowerShell(az webapp ssh --command "ls -la /home/site/wwwroot && echo '---' && ls /home/site/wwwroot/wwwroot 2>/dev/null | head -20" -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg 2>&1)
PowerShell(az webapp config set -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg --startup-file "dotnet Blazorships.Server.dll" -o json --query "{appCommandLine:appCommandLine, linuxFxVersion:linuxFxVersion}" 2>&1)
PowerShell(az webapp deploy -n blazorships -g blazorships-rg --src-path ./app.zip --type zip --async false 2>&1)
